ddls:
CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "index" INTEGER /* Index of the data point */,
  "wrist_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the wrist position */,
  "wrist_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the wrist position */,
  "wrist_z" REAL /* Z coordinate of the wrist position */,
  "elbow_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the elbow position */,
  "elbow_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the elbow position */,
  "elbow_z" REAL /* Z coordinate of the elbow position */,
  "shoulder_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the shoulder position */,
  "shoulder_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the shoulder position */,
  "shoulder_z" REAL /* Z coordinate of the shoulder position */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was captured */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sensor */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athlete, therapist, trainer) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of injury risk associated with the activity */,
  "recommended_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency for performing the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the start of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the end of the session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource for which the permission is granted */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
